subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! That which thou didst write unto Haydar-Qiblih-'Alí became known and understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم آنچه بجناب حیدر قبل علی مرقوم نموده بودید معلوم و مفهوم شد و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
